name: GStreamer
description: Add a GStreamer build to a devcontainer

buildGlib.description: Whether to build GLib from fallback sources

buildType.description: The type of build to perform

tests.description: Whether to build the tests or not

examples.description: Whether to build the examples or not

docs.description: Whether to build the docs or not

gpl.description: Whether to build GPL licenced projects or not

introspection.description: Whether to build GIR introspection libs or not

extraArgs.description: Any additional meson args to pass to the configuration step
